news.title:
360 ONE WAM Ltd received a 71 ESG rating from SEBI-registered Category I provider.
The company disclosed the rating to stock exchanges on April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
360 ONE WAM Ltd received a 71 ESG rating from SEBI-registered Category I provider.
The company disclosed the rating to stock exchanges on April 1, 2026.

news.title:
360 ONE WAM Ltd redeems commercial papers with ISIN INE466L14FP2.
Redemption payment for 200 commercial papers completed on Mar 25, 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:
360 ONE to finance AIMS founder Narendra Pandey's 49% stake buyback.
The buyback involves private equity investors in Faridabad's AIMS hospital.
news.summary:
360 ONE to finance AIMS founder Narendra Pandey's 49% stake buyback.

news.title: 360 ONE WAM Ltd disclosed price-sensitive information under Regulation 51 (1), (2).
news.summary: 360 ONE WAM Ltd disclosed price-sensitive information under Regulation 51 (1), (2).

news.title:
360 ONE Mutual Fund revises exit load for 360 ONE Focused Fund, effective April 1, 2026.
Revised exit load: 1% if redeemed/switched within 12 months; NIL thereafter.
news.summary:
360 ONE Mutual Fund revises exit load for 360 ONE Focused Fund, effective April 1, 2026.
Revised exit load: 1% if redeemed/switched within 12 months; NIL thereafter.

news.title:
360 ONE WAM Ltd confirms redemption of 1000 Commercial Papers on 04 March 2026.
Details include Scrip Code 730869 and ISIN INE466L14FQ0 for the redeemed papers.
news.summary:
360 ONE WAM Ltd confirms redemption of 1000 Commercial Papers on 04 March 2026.
Details include Scrip Code 730869 and ISIN INE466L14FQ0 for the redeemed papers.

news.title:
Fund managers highlight SIFs complement Category III AIFs, offering distinct risk-return profiles.
SIFs allow controlled long-short strategies; Category III AIFs offer higher leverage and net short flexibility.
news.summary:
Fund managers highlight SIFs complement Category III AIFs, offering distinct risk-return profiles.
SIFs allow controlled long-short strategies; Category III AIFs offer higher leverage and net short flexibility.

news.title:
Home Essentials raised ₹70 cr in Pre-Series B led by 360 ONE Asset.
Existing investor India Quotient also participated in the funding round.
news.summary:
Home Essentials raised ₹70 cr in Pre-Series B led by 360 ONE Asset.
Existing investor India Quotient also participated in the funding round.

news.title:
360 One Prime accepted bids worth ₹7.51B for 2.4-year bonds.
The bonds will pay an 8.8% coupon, maturing on Jan 28, 2026.
news.summary:
360 One Prime accepted bids worth ₹7.51B for 2.4-year bonds.

news.title:
360 ONE WAM Ltd. saw an NSE block trade of ~400,391 shares at Rs. 1111.1.
The total transaction value for the trade amounted to Rs. 44.5 crores.
news.summary:

news.title:
360 ONE Asset acquires minority stake in Delhi-based House of Diagnostics.
The investment was made by 360 ONE Asset, a PE and VC fund.
news.summary:
360 ONE Asset acquires minority stake in Delhi-based House of Diagnostics.

news.title:
360 One Asset launches ₹1,000 crore fund for defence, spacetech.
The fund, from domestic investors, has an open greenshoe option.
news.summary:
360 One Asset launches ₹1,000 crore fund for defence, spacetech.

news.title:
360 ONE Asset, a unit of 360 ONE WAM, to invest $70M in Iscon Balaji Foods.
IBF, India's largest potato processor, operates an export-oriented platform since 2013.
news.summary:

news.title:
360 One shares rise over 4% as profit grows 20% and revenue 33% YoY.
Market breadth weakens; NSE advance-decline ratio stands at 2:3.
news.summary:
360 One shares rise over 4% as profit grows 20% and revenue 33% YoY.
Market breadth weakens; NSE advance-decline ratio stands at 2:3.

news.title:
Angel One, 360 ONE WAM, HDFC AMC, and ICICI Prudential AMC gained up to 8% post strong Q3 results.
Angel One's net profit rose 27%, while 360 ONE WAM AUM grew 5.9%. ICICI Prudential AMC's AUM increased 6.1%.
news.summary:
Angel One, 360 ONE WAM, HDFC AMC, and ICICI Prudential AMC gained up to 8% post strong Q3 results.
Angel One's net profit rose 27%, while 360 ONE WAM AUM grew 5.9%. ICICI Prudential AMC's AUM increased 6.1%.

news.title:
360 ONE WAM aims to cut cost-to-income ratio to 45%-46% from 48.2%-48.3% next year.
Improvement driven by ET Money, HNI nearing breakeven, and core business productivity gains.
news.summary:
360 ONE WAM aims to cut cost-to-income ratio to 45%-46% from 48.2%-48.3% next year.
Improvement driven by ET Money, HNI nearing breakeven, and core business productivity gains.

news.title:
Citi raises 360 ONE WAM's target price to ₹1,700, up from ₹1,615.
This revision suggests a potential 48% upside from the previous close.
news.summary:
Citi raises 360 ONE WAM's target price to ₹1,700, up from ₹1,615.
This revision suggests a potential 48% upside from the previous close.

news.title:
360 ONE WAM Ltd reported Q3 FY26 PAT of Rs 331 Cr, up 20.3% YoY, and total revenue of Rs 826 Cr, up 21.8% YoY.
Assets under management rose to Rs 7,11,398 Cr, with Annual Recurring Revenue AUM at Rs 3,17,906 Cr, up 28.2% YoY.
news.summary:
360 ONE WAM Ltd reported Q3 FY26 PAT of Rs 331 Cr, up 20.3% YoY, and total revenue of Rs 826 Cr, up 21.8% YoY.
Assets under management rose to Rs 7,11,398 Cr, with Annual Recurring Revenue AUM at Rs 3,17,906 Cr, up 28.2% YoY.

The total transaction value for the trade was Rs. 18.05 Crores.
